definition.featurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="feature_container" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><value name="feature"><block type="feature_vegetation_patch"><field name="surface">floor</field><field name="vertical_range">5</field><field name="vegetation_chance">0.8</field><field name="replaceable">dirt</field><field name="extra_bottom_block_chance">0</field><field name="extra_edge_column_chance">0.3</field><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">This block represents a patch of moss on the ceiling, with some cave vines.</comment><value name="xz_radius"><block type="int_provider_uniform"><field name="min">4</field><field name="max">7</field></block></value><value name="vegetation_feature"><block type="configured_feature_reference"><field name="feature">CUSTOM:PumpkinBlobFeature</field><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">The patch generates with some cave vines</comment></block></value><value name="ground_state"><block type="blockstate_selector"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" inputs="0"></mutation><field name="block">CUSTOM:RedMossBlock</field></block></value><value name="depth"><block type="int_provider_uniform"><field name="min">1</field><field name="max">2</field></block></value></block></value><next><block type="placement_count"><comment pinned="false" h="92" w="224">We try to place up to 125 moss patches per chunk</comment><value name="count"><block type="int_provider_uniform"><field name="min">0</field><field name="max">2</field></block></value><next><block type="placement_in_square"><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="189">We then move each feature horizontally, so that they don't generate in the corner of the chunk</comment><next><block type="placement_heightmap"><field name="heightmap">MOTION_BLOCKING_NO_LEAVES</field><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">We then move each feature to the highest solid block or liquid</comment><next><block type="placement_biome_filter"><comment pinned="false" h="85" w="210">Finally, we check that the feature isn't outside of the biome. This placement modifier should always be the last one.</comment></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block><block type="placement_height_uniform" x="614" y="397"><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">We try to generate at random heights between the bottom of the world and Y=256</comment><value name="min"><block type="vertical_anchor_above_bottom"><field name="value">0</field></block></value><value name="max"><block type="vertical_anchor_absolute"><field name="value">256</field></block></value></block><block type="int_provider_constant" x="693" y="523"><field name="value">125</field><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">This is how many times the feature is repeated.</comment></block><block type="placement_environment_scan_advanced" inline="false" x="-249" y="660"><field name="maxSteps">12</field><field name="direction">UP</field><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">We check up to 12 blocks going up, until we find a solid block</comment><value name="searchCondition"><block type="block_predicate_is_air"></block></value><value name="condition"><block type="block_predicate_solid"><field name="x">0</field><field name="y">0</field><field name="z">0</field></block></value><next><block type="placement_offset"><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">We move the feature up by one block</comment><value name="xz"><block type="int_provider_constant"><field name="value">0</field></block></value><value name="y"><block type="int_provider_constant"><field name="value">-1</field></block></value><next><block type="placement_biome_filter"><comment pinned="false" h="85" w="210">Finally, we check that the feature isn't outside of the biome. This placement modifier should always be the last one.</comment></block></next></block></next></block><block type="placement_count" x="459" y="623"><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">We try to generate 1 or 2 trees in each chunk</comment><value name="count"><block type="int_provider_uniform"><field name="min">1</field><field name="max">2</field></block></value><next><block type="placement_in_square"><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">We move the feature so that it doesn't generate in the corner</comment><next><block type="placement_height_uniform"><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">We pick a random height between the bottom of the world and Y=256</comment><value name="min"><block type="vertical_anchor_above_bottom"><field name="value">0</field></block></value><value name="max"><block type="vertical_anchor_absolute"><field name="value">256</field></block></value></block></next></block></next></block><block type="placement_count" x="381" y="794"><comment pinned="false" h="92" w="224">Placement modifiers are processed from top to bottom. First, we repeat the feature twice on every chunk</comment><value name="count"><block type="int_provider_constant"><field name="value">2</field><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">This is how many times the feature is repeated.</comment></block></value><next><block type="placement_in_square"><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="189">We then move each feature horizontally, so that they don't generate in the corner of the chunk</comment></block></next></block><block type="placement_count" x="-249" y="830"><comment pinned="false" h="105" w="222">Placement modifiers are processed from top to bottom. We try to place 4 trees in each chunk</comment><value name="count"><block type="int_provider_constant"><field name="value">4</field></block></value><next><block type="placement_in_square"><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="189">We then move each tree horizontally, so that they don't generate in the corner of the chunk</comment><next><block type="placement_surface_water_depth"><field name="depth">0</field><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">This is how deep the water can be for the tree to generate. If the value is 0, the tree will never be submerged</comment><next><block type="placement_heightmap"><field name="heightmap">OCEAN_FLOOR</field><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">We then move each feature to the highest solid block (which might be underwater)</comment><next><block type="placement_biome_filter"><comment pinned="false" h="85" w="210">We check that the tree doesn't generate in the wrong biome</comment><next><block type="placement_block_survival_filter"><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">Finally, we check if the position is actually valid. Trees should generate only on blocks that support their sapling.</comment><value name="block"><block type="blockstate_selector"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" inputs="0"></mutation><field name="block">Blocks.SAPLING#0</field><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">This is the block used to check for the tree position. Generally it should be the sapling of the tree.</comment></block></value></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
